content:
The antora.yml was fixed. Can the watchdog manual be added back in now? We need to make some additions for a new rudder alarm. Thanks.

https://github.com/rgleason/watchdog_pi/commits/master
@Alec Leamas Taking for action.
Manual updated. You may need to clear the cache of web content to make Watchdog show in the alphabetical list.
This topic was moved here from #general > Watchdog Manual needed by Alec Leamas.
